nodes.title: Yumil MPM Note
widgets_values:
## Requirements
- Extension: comfyui-yumil-mpm
- Application: Yumil MPM
---
## Before You Start

- If this is your first time using Yumil MPM, it is a good idea to create a sample project from the app and read at least the introductory tutorial first.
---
## Setup Steps in Yumil MPM

1. Launch Yumil MPM.
2. In the CategoryTree, create a category named "PositivePrompt".
3. Check the checkbox next to the PositivePrompt category.
4. Add a new prompt to the PromptTree.
5. Edit the prompt text in the PromptEditor.
6. Check the checkbox next to the prompt in the PromptTree.
7. Repeat steps 2 through 6 for "NegativePrompt".
8. Press the Demand button in the Generation panel.
9. Return to ComfyUI and press the Run button.
---
## Notes

- If multiple prompts are checked in the PromptTree, one prompt is selected randomly by default.
- To generate output, at least one category in the CategoryTree and at least one prompt in the PromptTree must be checked.
- Categories checked in the CategoryTree are sent to ComfyUI. To use categories other than "PositivePrompt" and "NegativePrompt", add those category names to the ExternalPromptRequester node.
- The templates on the right are provided as optional examples for generating more varied results. They are not required for this workflow. To learn more, search for "Category Identifier" in the Yumil MPM instructions.
